conversation.content: there is not towers generate just make the towers with the blocks

steps.description: Create a folder to organize the towers
Create a script to generate the towers using blocks

payload.name: TowerGenerator
payload.source:
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
local folder = Workspace:WaitForChild("TwinTowers")

local function buildTower(positionOffset)
	local towerModel = Instance.new("Model")
	towerModel.Name = "Tower"
	towerModel.Parent = folder

	local numFloors = 40
	local floorHeight = 8
	local towerWidth = 40

	for i = 0, numFloors - 1 do
		-- Create the main floor block
		local floor = Instance.new("Part")
		floor.Name = "Floor_" .. (i + 1)
		floor.Size = Vector3.new(towerWidth, floorHeight, towerWidth)
		floor.Position = positionOffset + Vector3.new(0, (i * floorHeight) + (floorHeight / 2), 0)
		floor.Anchored = true
		floor.Material = Enum.Material.Concrete
		floor.Color = Color3.fromRGB(163, 162, 165)
		floor.Parent = towerModel

		-- Create decorative window bands
		local windows = Instance.new("Part")
		windows.Name = "Windows"
		windows.Size = Vector3.new(towerWidth + 0.5, floorHeight * 0.6, towerWidth + 0.5)
		windows.Position = floor.Position
		windows.Anchored = true
		windows.Material = Enum.Material.Glass
		windows.Transparency = 0.4
		windows.Color = Color3.fromRGB(13, 105, 172)
		windows.CanCollide = false
		windows.Parent = towerModel
	end

	-- Create a roof antenna for one of the towers
	if positionOffset.X < 0 then
		local antenna = Instance.new("Part")
		antenna.Name = "Antenna"
		antenna.Size = Vector3.new(2, 40, 2)
		antenna.Position = positionOffset + Vector3.new(0, (numFloors * floorHeight) + 20, 0)
		antenna.Anchored = true
		antenna.Color = Color3.fromRGB(50, 50, 50)
		antenna.Parent = towerModel
	end
end

-- Build the two towers with an offset
buildTower(Vector3.new(-45, 0, 0))
buildTower(Vector3.new(45, 0, 0))
